summary:
A severe form of head injury leading to a bleed around the surface of the brain has been identified; this condition strongly suggests \boxed{subarachnoid hemorrhage}. This matches well with trauma history indicating potential for such complications post-injury. ```plaintext
The CT scan indicates extradural hematoma along with signs suggestive of significant head trauma, pointing towards 
\boxed{\text{severe closed-head injury}} as the primary cause behind these imaging findings.
``` 

This summary focuses only on the critical aspects needed to identify the likely diagnosis from the available information about the patient’s symptoms and test results. It highlights both the specific type of hematomas observed and their association with serious cranio-cerebral trauma consistent with what was inferred by Agent2 during its analysis process.
